'''jadhama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coag|coag]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-dh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coag|coag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jadhama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jædhæmæth|jædhæmæth]] || [[word:jædhæmæj|jædhæmæj]] || [[word:jædhæmæsh|jædhæmæsh]] || [[word:jædhæmæ|jædhæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jadhadhamath|jadhadhamath]] || [[word:jadhadhamaj|jadhadhamaj]] || [[word:jadhadhamash|jadhadhamash]] || [[word:jadhadhama|jadhadhama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jadhamath|jadhamath]] || [[word:jadhamaj|jadhamaj]] || [[word:jadhamash|jadhamash]] || [[word:jadhama|jadhama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jadhafmath|jadhafmath]] || [[word:jadhafmaj|jadhafmaj]] || [[word:jadhafmash|jadhafmash]] || [[word:jadhafmaf|jadhafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jadhamatha|jadhamatha]] || [[word:jadhamaja|jadhamaja]] || [[word:jadhamasha|jadhamasha]] || [[word:jadhamaka|jadhamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jadhamath|jadhamath]] || [[word:jadhamaj|jadhamaj]] || [[word:jadhamash|jadhamash]] || [[word:jadhama|jadhama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jadhamathal|jadhamathal]] || [[word:jadhamajal|jadhamajal]] || [[word:jadhamashal|jadhamashal]] || [[word:jadhamakal|jadhamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jadhamathatha|jadhamathatha]] || [[word:jadhamajaja|jadhamajaja]] || [[word:jadhamashasha|jadhamashasha]] || [[word:jadhamaka|jadhamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jadhamathan|jadhamathan]] || [[word:jadhamajan|jadhamajan]] || [[word:jadhamashan|jadhamashan]] || [[word:jadhamakan|jadhamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jadhamathaoro|jadhamathaoro]] || [[word:jadhamajaoro|jadhamajaoro]] || [[word:jadhamashaoro|jadhamashaoro]] || [[word:jadhamakaoro|jadhamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
